name: relay
description: Enterprise internal chat — npm workspaces monorepo (backend, desktop, admin)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,desktop -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,desktop,admin -c blue,magenta,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:desktop" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up -d postgres redis minio minio-init
scripts.build: npm run build -w relay-backend && npm run build -w relay-desktop && npm run build -w relay-admin
